Peter,

In 8 days, I get the honor of fighting for you in the first presidential debate against Crooked Hillary Clinton.

To prepare for the BIGGEST night of our campaign, I'm turning to the very people who have humbled me and gotten me to where I am today...YOU.

As your champion, I need to know what you want me to fight for on that stage. I want you to be confident that I defend the issues you care about. I want to make you proud, Peter.

[**Which is why I 'm asking you to take the TRUMP Debate Preparation Survey now. >>**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37625752:s7VA3KbNv:m:1:1155937413:C677025725BB7B6409657C045E58E1E0:r)

Peter, this debate isn't even about me. I'm only going on stage to be your voice. This debate is a fight between the American people and the political machine that Crooked Hillary represents.

We get the chance to compare -- side-by-side -- our vision of a freer, safer, and more prosperous America with Hillary's promise to bring four more years of Obama's failures.

I want your honest input. If you disagree with something, tell me you disagree. Look, I never made it in business surrounding myself with people who tell me what I want to hear. Our campaign is about telling it like it is -- and that's not changing. Not now. Not ever.

With the debate coming up FAST, I'll need your input IMMEDIATELY.

name: Marco Rubio (Personal Account)
subject: This wasn't easy to write...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016
body:
This wasn't easy to sit down and write to you...
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37626063:sPQxMKbNw:m:1:1328517760:DE8CFFBA2A2701903870520F395BEBB3:r)
---
Friend,

This email is difficult to write. In fact, I have never written an email like this before.

I really hope you will take just a minute to read it.

**Today I'm going to ask you to make a personal commitment. And I hope and pray I can count on you.**

You see, if you are like me, you are probably very tired of this long campaign season - and the divisiveness and negativity this year has carried seems like it has reached an astounding all-time high.

But I'm sure you'll also agree with me that the stakes are so high in this election - for the future of our country - that we have to do everything we can to secure a Republican majority in the Senate and elect leaders who -- no matter the outcome of the presidential race -- will reverse Barack Obama's agenda.

**[BUT it all starts with your help today -- only with your IMMEDIATE action today can we ensure the United States Senate remains in Republican control.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37626063:sPQxMKbNw:m:1:1328517760:DE8CFFBA2A2701903870520F395BEBB3:r)**

That's why I made the decision -- a personal commitment to you and my fellow conservatives -- to run for re-election.

But before I ask you for your commitment in return, I'm going to lay out my own, very personal commitment to you.

First, my commitment to you:

1. **I will campaign as hard as I can until the very last vote is counted.** Every day I will wake up and fight for you and America to ensure liberal Democrats don't control the U.S. Senate.
2. **I will fight to reverse every destructive item of the Obama Agenda.** Barack Obama's presidency has been a disaster for America - and with your help I will reverse every last destructive policy.
3. **I will make the necessary sacrifices to win this race and defeat my liberal opponent, Patrick Murphy - a die-hard Obama apologist and Clinton supporter.** I know you and your family make sacrifices every day and I am committed to making the necessary sacrifices to win this race and serve our nation in the US Senate.
4. **My word is my bond, and I will keep every commitment I make to you.** We all know politicians who say one thing and do another. I will always tell you the truth and you can count on me to follow through with my commitments to you.

I hope you accept this, my promise and commitment to you.

**But in return, I am asking you to make a commitment to me.**

Friend, will you commit to helping me defeat my Democrat opponent, keep Republican control of the Senate, and ultimately ensure that I am able to fight for us AND reverse Barack Obama's disastrous policies?

| [** I'M COMMITTED >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37626063:sPQxMKbNw:m:1:1328517760:DE8CFFBA2A2701903870520F395BEBB3:r)
---

**I need your commitment to win this race. I truly can't do it without you.**

Can I count on your commitment?

Because Friend, my campaign is facing critical fundraising challenges and frankly, I don't have anywhere else to turn. So, that's why I'm turning to you, and that's why your commitment in return is so important.

[** I'M COMMITTED >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37626063:sPQxMKbNw:m:1:1328517760:DE8CFFBA2A2701903870520F395BEBB3:r)
---

**[I know I can't win this election without your support, so I hope I'll be able to count on you today. I want to personally thank you for reading my email and I'm hopeful you will make the necessary commitment to my campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37626063:sPQxMKbNw:m:1:1328517760:DE8CFFBA2A2701903870520F395BEBB3:r) **

Marco Rubio

P.S. This election is not going to be easy, but our future is worth fighting for. I'm facing a tough campaign against Barack & Hillary's handpicked Democratic candidate. They are viewing his success as an extension of their own and are going to be working around the clock to see him win and me defeated. **[I need your help to fight back.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37626063:sPQxMKbNw:m:1:1328517760:DE8CFFBA2A2701903870520F395BEBB3:r)**

[** I'M COMMITTED >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37626063:sPQxMKbNw:m:1:1328517760:DE8CFFBA2A2701903870520F395BEBB3:r)
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016

body:
Donald Trump is listening to the voices of millions of Americans who want a new direction in Washington. Add your voice and guide his campaign to victory over the Obama-Clinton liberals. |

Friend- The politicians and liberal elites have not been listening to you. But I hear you loud and clear. That’s why I am the people’s candidate for president with a rising movement of pro-America voters ready to take back our country. As one of my best and most loyal supporters, you can do a lot to help finish this race strong and send Crooked Hillary down to defeat. Please take a minute right now to complete our Listening to America Survey so I can hear your voice at this important moment in the race. You have my word I will take action on YOUR concerns and speak up for YOUR interests. That’s what I’ve been doing this whole time. When I said we should not be letting tens of thousands of Syrian refugees into our country if we don't know who they are, the liberal elites screamed out against me, but they were not listening to you. When I said we should build a real border wall because if you don’t have a border, you don’t have a country, they raged against me on TV, but they were not listening to you. When I said China is ripping us off with all these stupid trade deals, the liberal elites screamed about their globalist economic theories, but they were not listening to you. Well I have been listening to you, Friend. I have been taking you seriously. And I will not let you down. So our campaign – our pro-America movement – is taking a new approach that hasn’t been tried before by the D.C. insiders. I am campaigning on a message that seeks to represent the American people only, NOT lobbyists, NOT the media, and NOT corporate elites. The reason I have surged in the polls from 'day one' of this race is because I have been listening to you – the great silent majority of Americans - and keeping you and other supporters engaged every step along the way. With just two months to go before Election Day, I need you to stay engaged more than ever, so please complete our Listening to America Survey. In addition to your valuable answers, I also hope I can count on you to make a special donation in support of our campaign at this critical time. Crooked Hillary has tons of money from the liberal elites who have rigged everything against you. The media are in her corner too, and frankly I don’t think I’ve seen the media in this country behave in such a disgusting way as they have against me. So many lies! So help me cut through the media nonsense and take our message right to the people. Complete our Listening to America Survey Thank you, Donald Trump

Last month, my brother Don led the charge on an incredible fundraising push for my father's campaign.

**We asked people to "Power the Trump Train," and through that effort we gained thousands of new supporters and SMASHED through our $7 million one-week fundraising goal!**

Today we're outworking the Clinton campaign, we have a HUGE edge in voter enthusiasm, and we're rising in the polls as Crooked Hillary sinks.

And our incredible momentum now is thanks in large part to how we kicked August off strong through Don's "Power the Trump Train" effort!

**That 's why I'm so excited to kick off Round 2 of "Power the Trump Train" today. We've set a goal to raise $15 million over the next seven days - starting RIGHT NOW!**

[**Please JOIN my father 's campaign at this critical time with a $250, $100, $50, $25, or $10 "Power the Trump Train" contribution.**](http://trk.listelixr.net/c/4/?T=OTkyNjA2OTc%3AMDItYjE2MjYyLTc1NDAzNzJlZGI2MTQ5YTViOGQ5OTJiMzEzNzU2YmEw%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AMjgyNTQ5Mjg%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%&K=rHoGV7ht4zqIobpZj7gHAw)

**Election Day is just 51 days away, and early voting kicks off NEXT FRIDAY!**

This election is going to come down to the wire. If we win, my father and Governor Pence will fight every waking hour to put the American people first, end the rigged system in Washington and get our country back on track...and as an added bonus, we'll END Hillary Clinton's political career for good!

body:
| Derek --

One of my responsibilities as the digital director for Virginia is being in charge of our Facebook and Twitter accounts. That means coming up with the hashtags, finding the photos to share, and most importantly, making sure we energize our followers to turn out and vote for Hillary.

I know I can count on this team here in Virginia -- and if you have your own Facebook or Twitter account, we would love your help in promoting Hillary online! So this Wednesday, we’re holding a call with our most committed supporters to talk about the best ways to use social media. We’ll teach you all the best practices that can help ensure we reach as many voters online as possible here in Virginia.

**[Will you RSVP to join our call?](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY1Mzg0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNzAzMTk4S0&mt=2&rj=ODgyNzAzMTk4S0&rt=0)**

Now that we’re just 51 days away from Election Day, we’re not wasting any opportunities to get in touch with potential voters. We use our pages to share the hard work this team puts in, share the ideals we’re fighting for, and even spread the word so everyone knows when Hillary is coming to town!

**We’d love for you to get involved online, Derek. RSVP now for our social media training on Wednesday:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY1Mzg0NzYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyNzAzMTk4S0&mt=2&rj=ODgyNzAzMTk4S0&rt=0)
I can’t wait to speak with you,

Jess

Virginia Digital Director
Hillary for America

name: Marco Rubio (personal account)
subject: This wasn't easy to write...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016
body:
This wasn't easy to sit down and write to you...
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37636938:WRdv8dbfN:m:1:1353064270:8B8BBA3DDCD1E18AB5E2D0D1B1D756E3:r)
---
Peter,

This email is difficult to write. In fact, I have never written an email like this before.

I really hope you will take just a minute to read it.

**Today I'm going to ask you to make a personal commitment. And I hope and pray I can count on you.**

You see, if you are like me, you are probably very tired of this long campaign season - and the divisiveness and negativity this year has carried seems like it has reached an astounding all-time high.

But I'm sure you'll also agree with me that the stakes are so high in this election - for the future of our country - that we have to do everything we can to secure a Republican majority in the Senate and elect leaders who -- no matter the outcome of the presidential race -- will reverse Barack Obama's agenda.

**[BUT it all starts with your help today -- only with your IMMEDIATE action today can we ensure the United States Senate remains in Republican control.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37636938:WRdv8dbfN:m:1:1353064270:8B8BBA3DDCD1E18AB5E2D0D1B1D756E3:r)**

That's why I made the decision -- a personal commitment to you and my fellow conservatives -- to run for re-election.

But before I ask you for your commitment in return, I'm going to lay out my own, very personal commitment to you.

First, my commitment to you:

1. **I will campaign as hard as I can until the very last vote is counted.** Every day I will wake up and fight for you and America to ensure liberal Democrats don't control the U.S. Senate.
2. **I will fight to reverse every destructive item of the Obama Agenda.** Barack Obama's presidency has been a disaster for America - and with your help I will reverse every last destructive policy.
3. **I will make the necessary sacrifices to win this race and defeat my liberal opponent, Patrick Murphy - a die-hard Obama apologist and Clinton supporter.** I know you and your family make sacrifices every day and I am committed to making the necessary sacrifices to win this race and serve our nation in the US Senate.
4. **My word is my bond, and I will keep every commitment I make to you.** We all know politicians who say one thing and do another. I will always tell you the truth and you can count on me to follow through with my commitments to you.

I hope you accept this, my promise and commitment to you.

**But in return, I am asking you to make a commitment to me.**

Peter, will you commit to helping me defeat my Democrat opponent, keep Republican control of the Senate, and ultimately ensure that I am able to fight for us AND reverse Barack Obama's disastrous policies?

| [** I'M COMMITTED >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37636938:WRdv8dbfN:m:1:1353064270:8B8BBA3DDCD1E18AB5E2D0D1B1D756E3:r)
---

**I need your commitment to win this race. I truly can't do it without you.**

Can I count on your commitment?

Because Peter, my campaign is facing critical fundraising challenges and frankly, I don't have anywhere else to turn. So, that's why I'm turning to you, and that's why your commitment in return is so important.

[** I'M COMMITTED >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37636938:WRdv8dbfN:m:1:1353064270:8B8BBA3DDCD1E18AB5E2D0D1B1D756E3:r)
---

**[I know I can't win this election without your support, so I hope I'll be able to count on you today. I want to personally thank you for reading my email and I'm hopeful you will make the necessary commitment to my campaign.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37636938:WRdv8dbfN:m:1:1353064270:8B8BBA3DDCD1E18AB5E2D0D1B1D756E3:r) **

Marco Rubio

P.S. This election is not going to be easy, but our future is worth fighting for. I'm facing a tough campaign against Barack & Hillary's handpicked Democratic candidate. They are viewing his success as an extension of their own and are going to be working around the clock to see him win and me defeated. **[I need your help to fight back.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37636938:WRdv8dbfN:m:1:1353064270:8B8BBA3DDCD1E18AB5E2D0D1B1D756E3:r)**

[** I'M COMMITTED >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/37636938:WRdv8dbfN:m:1:1353064270:8B8BBA3DDCD1E18AB5E2D0D1B1D756E3:r)
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate 2016

name: Lisa Bullock
subject: the incredible place where we grew up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend, Raising our three kids here makes it important to me and Steve that Montana stays the same incredible place where we grew up. It's personal to us.

I watch how hard Steve works and how much he cares about the future of our state. I also have a close-up view at how expensive campaigns are -- and how important it is that Steve has the resources to ensure his message is heard during the final weeks of this race. **[Will you help out with a grassroots donation of $15?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=DftQHTdgUi0yOt3oo9bK1lj51AtQY1pj)**

As I ask for your support for Steve's reelection, I'd like to take a quick moment to share what motivates him every single day.

Our eldest daughter just started ninth grade at the exact same high school Steve and I attended. He's worked across the aisle to make record investments in our public schools because he knows the intrinsic value of a quality education.

He's made pay equity for women a key priority of his administration because we're raising our daughters and son to believe that women can achieve anything they want through hard work and dedication. And he understands that when women are fairly compensated, it strengthens all of our families.

Steve has fought to protect access to public lands and waters his entire career so we can take our kids hiking and fishing in the same places we enjoyed as children.

And Steve continues to be laser-focused on maintaining Montana's reputation for fiscal responsibility so that we can make investments in our future and continue to grow our economy with good, family-supporting jobs.

I'm so touched by the outpouring of support we've already seen in this campaign. **[You can pitch in $15 here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=CcK6YPs%2F%2BdSuyPoHjEEGx1j51AtQY1pj)**

In genuine gratitude,

Lisa Bullock

body:
The situation is shifting | Derek --

A month ago, a lot of people seemed to think that our lead in this race was all but locked -- no matter how many times we said that this race is going to be very close.

But the situation is changing. With Trump’s gains this week in Florida, Ohio, and North Carolina, things are looking tight. Two days ago, even Nate Silver wrote a story for _FiveThirtyEight_ with this headline: “Election Update: Democrats Should Panic... If The Polls Still Look Like This In A Week.”

Let me assure you: No one at headquarters is panicking. But we know that we are running out of time in this election to execute on our plan and build up our leads in battleground states.

The only question is whether we’ll have the money to get the job done.

**That’s where you come in, Derek. We can’t relax in these final seven weeks -- we need to push harder than we ever have, because the stakes have never been higher. Every donation matters, including yours, right now. Elan
